title: Tatooine navigation system
content:
{{Top|leg}}
The [[Planet/Legends|planet]] '''[[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]]''' had a unique '''system of navigation'''. It was divided into quadrants, and each point on the planet was represented by a set of coordinates that consisted of a letter, then four-digit number, then another letter, then another four-digit number.

The [[Dune Sea/Legends|Dune Sea]] was located in the first quadrant, and [[Ben Kenobi's home/Legends|Ben Kenobi's hut]] was located at coordinates Alpha-1733-Mu-9033 of that quadrant.

==Behind the scenes==
This coordinate system makes use of the [[Tionese/Legends|Tionese alphabet]].

==Appearances==
*''[[The Life and Legend of Obi-Wan Kenobi]]''
